_publications._publicationTitle: Performance Evaluation of SpliceAI for the Prediction of Splicing of

_contextSnippet: By the combined analysis of MaxEntScan (MES) and Splice Site Finder-like (SSF); abbreviated as MES/SSF further in the manuscript, the sensitivity and specificity were 83.6%...
details: Combined with SSF showed sensitivity of 83.6% (95% CI, 73.1–91.2%) and specificity of 82.6% (95% CI, 76.8–87.4)
